title: RPGMC
description: A 1.21 Modpack That Aims To Turn Minecraft Into An RPG
body:
A 1.21 Modpack That Aims To Turn Minecraft Into An RPG Adding New Structures, A Boss, Weapons, Armour, Spells, A Couple Optimisation Mods, Revamped Combat And So Much More! With Amazing Visuals And Gameplay This Modpack Could Be Something Worth Trying If You Like RPGs!

Some Notable Custom Structures:
End Lighthouses,
Nether Skeleton Camps,
Improved Villages,
Wells,
End Castles,
Jungle Ruins,
Swamp Villages,
Custom End Ships,
Toxic Lairs,
Triden Trail Monuments,
Piglin Camps,
Jungle Villages,
Shrines,
Hamlets,
Illager Hideouts,
Gazebos
And Many More!

Some Notable Custom Weapons:
Paladin Sword,
Kukri,
Uchigatana,
Cleaver,
Steel Sword,
Water Sword,
Crimson Sword,
Hammer (Any Material),
Claymore (Any Material),
Mace (Any Material),
Dagger (Any Material),
Sickle (Any Material),
Composite Longbow,
Heavy Crossbow
And Many More!
